title: 宝塚記念の後に・ミラ、ようやく

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can do it... I can do it... I CAN DO IT! Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Doto! I have anxiously awaited
this fated moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I won't let you get ahead! Not a chance! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That's right... I remember now.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(This heat in my chest. The trembling throughout
my whole body. The rapid beating of my heart...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Each one of these racers claims to be the best.
And racing against them—)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Racing against rivals...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back, Admire Vega suddenly stops in
front of the entrance to Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's as if she's savoring the heat of competition
before it fades.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I said let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I get the feeling she's still holding something in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So I decide...
choice_data_list: How about we make a little detour?
How about we make a little detour?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A detour?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We leave Hanshin Racecourse and walk for a bit.
Coming across a takoyaki stand, and we decide
to buy some.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We find a bench where we can sit and share the
piping hot takoyaki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing the quick snack, I'm reminded of
something.
choice_data_list:
Which race are you thinking about aiming for
next?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Next...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking. What does it mean to be a
good sister?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What... do I want to be?
choice_data_list: Good question. What do you want to do?
Good question. What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do you know what a first-magnitude star is?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's a star whose light goes completely
unmatched, a star that shines its light to the
farthest reaches of space.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That kind of light... that glory... That's what I
want.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... from now on...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll enjoy racing to the fullest. I won't hold back
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't try to represent her. I'll just run to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And then victory, and the light of a
first-magnitude star, will both be mine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's the kind of sister I want to be... Someone
she can be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Someone she can be proud of more than anything
else.
choice_data_list: All right. If that's the case...
All right. If that's the case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has set forth toward a new dream.
But she'll need a goal to make her first step to
this new top.
choice_data_list: Let's tackle the autumn Tenno Sho.
Let's tackle the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's the first race in the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown... a race to compete for the historic
autumn shield.
choice_data_list:
That kind of race will complement the light of a
first-magnitude star.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah... then that's my next stop.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean... our next stop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not for devotion or for duty, she's doing this
solely for what her heart and legs wish to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega steps forward, and I follow close
behind when the reality of our decision hits
me—we're taking on the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
...And that concludes our highlights from the
Takarazuka Kinen today! What an incredible race
it was!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and Admire Vega ran well today,
but who expected to see Meisho Doto up there
with them?!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
A G1 first for her—it's as if we witnessed a turning
point in history!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: What an incredible race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Doto was incredible too...
